description: A compact display component showing a large animated number (counter) with a category label and description text. Used to highlight key statistics and impact metrics.

layout.structure: Centered stat display with number, suffix, and description

FR-01.title: Category Label
FR-01.description: The block MUST display an H2 category label above the stat value.
acceptance: H2 heading identifying the metric category (e.g., 'impact', 'Company')

FR-02.title: Animated Counter Number
FR-02.description: The block MUST display a large numeric value that animates (counts up) when scrolled into view.
acceptance: Number animates from 0 to target value on scroll-into-view
Supports numeric formats: integers (75), decimals (32.4), currency ($725M)

FR-03.title: Description Text
FR-03.description: The block MUST display a description text below the counter number.
acceptance: Short descriptive text explaining the metric

FR-04.title: Scroll-Trigger Animation
FR-04.description: The counter animation MUST be triggered by scroll intersection.
acceptance: Animation starts when element enters the viewport (IntersectionObserver)
Animation plays once (not repeated on re-scroll)
If prefers-reduced-motion is enabled, show final value immediately without animation

A.description: A standalone single stat counter displayed inline within a section. Used alongside other content blocks.

additionalRequirements.FR-A01: Single stat displayed in a compact card format.
additionalRequirements.FR-A02: May appear side-by-side with another single stat counter.

B.description: A row of 4 stat counters displayed horizontally, used to present multiple impact metrics at once.
elements: H3 section heading ('Our impact by the numbers')
4 stat items in a row, each with number + description

additionalRequirements.FR-B01: 4 stat items displayed in a single horizontal row on desktop.
additionalRequirements.FR-B02: Responsive: 2x2 grid on tablet, stacked on mobile.
additionalRequirements.FR-B03: Each stat item evenly distributed within the container.

accessibility.AC-01: Counter final value MUST be available in the DOM immediately (not only via animation)
accessibility.AC-02: If prefers-reduced-motion is set, animation MUST be disabled
accessibility.AC-03: Stat value and description MUST be readable by screen readers as a complete phrase
